title: China exports in June rise at fastest pace since 2021 as AI boom, tariff rush lift trade
summary_full: China's exports to the U.S. jumped around 14% last month while imports grew 26%, according to CNBC calculation of the official data.
summary_public: China's exports to the U.S. jumped around 14% last month while imports grew 26%, according to CNBC calculation of the official data.
